RUNESMITH2-GRINDSTONE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
{GrindstonePower:plural:This turn|For {GrindstonePower:diff()} turns}, whenever you play a card, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it. If the card cannot be [gold]Upgraded[/gold], [gold]Enhance[/gold] it instead.
RUNESMITH2-GRINDSTONE.title: Grindstone
RUNESMITH2-HAMMER_SWING.title: Hammer Swing
RUNESMITH2-HEAT_EXCHANGE.description:
Deal {CalculationBase} damage to ALL enemies.
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each of your {Ignis:elementsIcons(0)}.
Lose {Ignis:elementsIcons()}.{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}

[red](Rune Slots are full)[/red]|}
RUNESMITH2-ORIGO.title: Origo
RUNESMITH2-OVERLOAD.description:
Give your oldest Rune {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].
If it has at least {Threshold} [gold]Charges[/gold], trigger its passive ability for each [gold]Charge[/gold] and [gold]Break[/gold] it.
RUNESMITH2-OVERLOAD.title: Overload
RUNESMITH2-QUICK_CHARGE.description: Give your oldest [gold]Rune[/gold] {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold] and trigger its passive ability.
RUNESMITH2-QUICK_CHARGE.title: Quick Charge
RUNESMITH2-RUNE_HURL.description:
[gold]Break[/gold] your oldest Rune to deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you don't have any Runes, draw {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s}.
RUNESMITH2-RUNE_HURL.title: Rune Hurl
RUNESMITH2-SAXUM.description:
[gold]Craft[/gold] a [gold]Saxum[/gold] Rune with {Potency:diff()} [gold]Potency[/gold] and {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].{IfFull:

RUNESMITH2-SAXUM.title: Saxum
RUNESMITH2-SHIFTING_HAMMER.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice. [gold]Enhance[/gold] {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s} by the number of unblocked hits.
RUNESMITH2-SHIFTING_HAMMER.title: Shifting Hammer
RUNESMITH2-STABILIZE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Set the [gold]Charge[/gold] of all Runes to {Charge:diff()}.
RUNESMITH2-STABILIZE.title: Stabilize
RUNESMITH2-STATIC_CAGE.title: Static Cage
RUNESMITH2-STEAMING_CHISEL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Gain {Ignis:elementsIcons()} and {Aqua:elementsIcons()}.
RUNESMITH2-STEAMING_CHISEL.title: Steaming Chisel
RUNESMITH2-STRIKE_RUNESMITH.title: Strike
